rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees involving ports, implementation scopes for bindings
For implementation contracts, use assign only for output features or declared auxiliary variables; do not place guarantees in implementation scope
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE type declarations match AADL scalar types (int, real, bool) and align assumed vs actual types in expressions
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE logical operators include and, or, not(...), and implication =>
Constants and equations should use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) with proper type alignment
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Avoid Boolean domain conversions to integers; use exact Boolean expressions only when port is an AGREE bool in scope
irrelevant_topics: model repair and validator-driven minimal repair patterns
